title: Mrs. Bland
html:
Mrs. Bland

The Grants Pass high school faculty member who functioned as Yahir's internship broker and one of the named teen-era adults scaffolding him through the grants pass teen era. Sits alongside Brenda, Travis, and Scott Carnes in the small set of outside-the-household adults Yahir actively coordinated with.

Key facts

  • Internship-broker role: pinned in 2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship as the conduit to the Scott Carnes / Coding Zeal (Medford dev shop) internship lead — "Talk to Mrs. Bland about internship." The Carnes thread reappears in 2019 11 13 coding zeal 16 days later but appears not to have converted.
  • Conflict-orbit adult: named in 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it as one of the named outside-adults Yahir leaned on during family conflict — listed alongside Brenda, Travis, and Scott Carnes as the "named teen-era humans who scaffolded Yahir."
  • Graduation-orbit adjacency: Mrs. Gerard (handler of 2021 graduation group assignments per 2021 05 30 dear mrs gerard) is a parallel faculty-administrator figure but not the same person — Mrs. Bland is the internship broker, Mrs. Gerard is the graduation administrator.

Source summaries

  • 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it
  • 2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship
  • 2021 05 30 dear mrs gerard

Connections

grants pass teen era · grants pass or · scott carnes · brenda aguilera · travis · 2021 graduation

Open questions

  • First name?
  • What subject did she teach (or was she a counselor)?
  • Did she scaffold any other internship leads beyond Scott Carnes?
